# The Saw Dust Shop

> Handcrafted custom wooden outdoor furniture and backyard structures built by hand in Caledonia, Wisconsin. We build patio sets, swings, garden boxes, benches, custom mailboxes, decorative wishing wells, and one-of-a-kind pieces for homeowners across southeast Wisconsin.

## About

The Saw Dust Shop is a local woodworking business based in Caledonia, Wisconsin. We specialize in handcrafted outdoor furniture made from thicker, higher-quality lumber than retail alternatives. Every piece is built by hand — not mass produced. We serve homeowners within approximately 20–30 miles of Caledonia, WI.

## Products & Services

- **Patio Sets**: Complete outdoor seating sets — conversation sets, picnic tables, and custom configurations with carved details
- **Swings**: A-frame yard swings, porch swings, and gliders with custom carved cutouts (cardinals, butterflies, hearts, bucks, and more)
- **Garden Boxes**: Raised garden beds, planter boxes, and trellis designs in custom sizes
- **Benches**: Outdoor benches, porch seating, and memorial benches
- **Mailboxes**: Custom wooden mailboxes in unique shapes — truck-shaped, barn-style, and fully custom designs
- **Wishing Wells**: Decorative wishing wells with log-cabin style construction, shingled roofs, and custom stain or paint (including team-themed designs like Green Bay Packers)
- **Custom Builds**: One-of-a-kind projects including wooden bars with stools, garden solar light posts, and unique one-off pieces

## Materials

Primarily cedar and pressure-treated lumber. Thicker boards than most retail furniture for better weight, stability, and durability. Finished with protective stains and sealants for Wisconsin weather.

## Service Area

**Home base**: Caledonia, Wisconsin
**Also serving**: Oak Creek, South Milwaukee, Racine, Franklin, Cudahy, St. Francis, and surrounding southeast Wisconsin communities within 20–30 miles.

## Contact

- **Phone**: (262) 488-0879
- **Location**: Caledonia, Wisconsin
- **Quote requests**: https://www.thesawdustshopwi.com/contact/
- **Hours**: Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
